description: Landing page access control improvements - consistent redirect behavior and role isolation

changes.description: Add access control for all landing pages (employers, candidates, scouts)
Restrict operators page to operators only (remove manager access)
Replace wp_die() fallbacks with consistent redirect to /403-forbidden/
Update PAGE-ACCESS-CONTROL.md with new behavior and access matrix
Add rule to always return to develop branch after deployment

pre_checks: Verify all role-based test users exist (manager_test, operator_test, employer_test, candidate_test, scout_test)

steps.description: Login as each test user and verify access restrictions work correctly

post_checks: Each role can only access their designated landing page
All unauthorized access attempts redirect to /403-forbidden/ with URL change (no inline errors)

steps: Verify access control returns to previous behavior

notes: This release improves security isolation between roles
Operators page is now restricted to operators only (managers no longer have access)
Consistent user experience - all unauthorized access attempts redirect to /403-forbidden/
No breaking changes - only adds restrictions where they were missing
